channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.thesixthaxis.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.thesixthaxis.com

item.title: South of Midnight heads to PS5 and Switch 2 March 31st
item.content:encoded:
Compulsion Games has revealed that its action adventure game South of Midnight is coming to PS5 and Switch 2, and there is not a long wait ahead. South of Midnight will be available on March 31st for both consoles, approximately a year after it released on PC and Xbox Series X|S. You can check out the Switch 2 announcement trailer below, and the PS5 trailer here.

In South of Mind players are dropped into the world of Prospero as Hazel. Hazel is a 19-year-old with a remarkable set of abilities that emerge through the game as she discovers and becomes a Weaver. These abilities let her see beyond the surface of the world, viewing the strands that tap into a deeper reality and the Grand Tapestry that binds everything together.

South of Midnight Review

In our South of Midnight review, Dom said, “The Southern Gothic aesthetic is wholly under-explored in gaming. Because of that, South of Midnight feels utterly refreshing and genuinely magical and mysterious.  In turn, Hazel is an undeniably compelling character, and you can’t help but want to see how her journey plays out. It’s yet another unmissable step on Microsoft’s path to redemption.”

Source: Compulsion Games 



https://www.thesixthaxis.com/2026/03/06/south-of-midnight-heads-to-ps5-and-switch-2-march-31st/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
